mapper.insert: insert into biz_test_result (task_id, standard_id, phase, val_f, val_delta, val_du, val_upt, val_uyb, is_pass) values (#{taskId}, #{standardId}, #{phase}, #{valF}, #{valDelta}, #{valDu}, #{valUpt}, #{valUyb}, #{isPass})

insert into biz_test_result (task_id, standard_id, phase, val_f, val_delta, val_du, val_upt, val_uyb, is_pass) values
(#{item.taskId}, #{item.standardId}, #{item.phase}, #{item.valF}, #{item.valDelta}, #{item.valDu}, #{item.valUpt}, #{item.valUyb}, #{item.isPass})
mapper.select: select id, task_id, standard_id, phase, val_f, val_delta, val_du, val_upt, val_uyb, is_pass from biz_test_result where task_id = #{taskId} order by id
select id, task_id, standard_id, phase, val_f, val_delta, val_du, val_upt, val_uyb, is_pass from biz_test_result where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update biz_test_result set val_f = #{valF}, val_delta = #{valDelta}, val_du = #{valDu}, val_upt = #{valUpt}, val_uyb = #{valUyb}, is_pass = #{isPass} where id = #{id}
